name: beamhop-relay-v2
description: A Bun/TypeScript Nostr relay with pluggable NIP support and optional SQLite persistence.

scripts.build:binary: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile build/entrypoint.ts --outfile dist/beamhop-relay
scripts.build:binary:linux: mkdir -p dist && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64-musl build/entrypoint.ts --outfile dist/beamhop-relay
